---
title: "Housing Price Prediction from Trulia.com Data"
author: "Sam Fortescue, Mark Gardner, Nat Koonmee"
date: "12/06/21"
output:
  beamer_presentation: default
  slidy_presentation: default
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(GGally)
library(ISLR)
library(class)
library(MASS)
library(dplyr)
library(gbm) ## boosting package
library(randomForest) 
library(glmnet)
library(modelr)
library(rpart)
library(splines)
library(zoo)
library(dplyr)
library(ISLR) ## data package
library(tidyverse) ## data manipulation
library(knitr) ## tables
library(tree)
library(dplyr)
library(caret)

```


```{r, include = FALSE }
realData <- read_csv("realEstate.csv")
#head(realData)
#colnames(realData)
re <- realData
re <- re[,c(-(1:3),-7,-12,-18,-27,-29,-(31:68))]
#realData2 <- re
re <- na.omit(re)
realData2 <- re


#realData2 <- realData2 %>% 
#  mutate(high_sales = factor(ifelse(Price > 400000, "high" , "low"))) 
#min(realData2$lotSize)
#max(realData2$lotSize)
#colnames(realData2)
#summary(realData2$high_sales)
#subset2$price <- separatedPrice
#realData2 <- subset(realData2, select = -c(Price))
#colnames(realData2)


```

```{r, include = FALSE}
colnames(realData2)
summary(realData2)
colnames(realData2)[5] <- "SqrFt"
colnames(realData2)
colnames(realData2)[5]
colnames(realData2)[8] <- "lotSize"
colnames(realData2)[8]
colnames(realData2)[11] <- "yearBuilt"
colnames(realData2)[11]
colnames(realData2)[12] <- "pricePerSqFoot"
colnames(realData2)[12]
colnames(realData2)[13] <- "lastSoldYear"
colnames(realData2)[13]
colnames(realData2)[14] <- "lastSoldFor"
colnames(realData2)[14]
colnames(realData2)[15] <- "lastTaxAssessment"
colnames(realData2)[15]
colnames(realData2)[16] <- "lastTaxYear"
colnames(realData2)[16]
colnames(realData2)[21] <- "addressFull"
colnames(realData2)[21]
colnames(realData2)[22] <- "dayOnTrulia"
colnames(realData2)[22]
colnames(realData2)

subset <- realData2
subset2 <- subset(subset, select = -c(Title, Description, Address, addressFull, City, State, Zipcode))
subset2$lastTaxAssessment <- parse_number(subset2$lastTaxAssessment)
subset2$Style <- parse_number(subset2$Style)
subset2$SqrFt <- parse_number(subset2$SqrFt)
subset2$lotSize <- parse_number(subset2$lotSize)
subset2$pricePerSqFoot <- parse_number(subset2$pricePerSqFoot)
subset2$lastSoldFor <- parse_number(subset2$lastSoldFor)
subset2$Price <- parse_number(subset2$Price)
names(subset2)

tree_fit <- tree(Price ~ ., data = subset2)


```

```{r, include = FALSE }

for (i in 1:length(realData2$lotSize)) {
  if (grepl("sqft",realData2$lotSize[i],fixed=TRUE)) {
    #inSqft[i] <- TRUE
    # re$LotSize[i] <- re$LotSize[i]*(1/43560)
    
    realData2$lotSize[i] <- parse_number(realData2$lotSize[i])*(1/43560)
  } else {
    #inSqft[i] <- FALSE
   realData2$lotSize[i] <- parse_number(realData2$lotSize[i])
  }
}
```



```{r, include = FALSE}
# RANDOM FOREST 
#names(subset2)
n <- nrow(subset2)
#n
n <- floor(.8 * nrow(subset2))
#n
train_ind <- sample(seq_len(nrow(subset2)),  size = n)
#names(subset2)
train_subset <- subset2[train_ind,]
#nrow(train_subset)
#ncol(train_subset)
#ncol(test_subset)
test_subset <- subset2[-train_ind,]
#nrow(test_subset)
#ncol(test_subset)
```

```{r, include = FALSE}

#4th try 
# COREECT BELOW 
train_subset3 <- train_subset %>%
          mutate_if(is.character, factor)

test_subset3 <- test_subset %>%
          mutate_if(is.character, factor)

#test_subset3$high_sales

ctrl_none <- trainControl(method = "none")

#names(train_subset3)
# https://therbootcamp.github.io/appliedML_2019Jan/_sessions/Prediction/Prediction_practical.html
# done below 
# test 

mvc <- 0 
for(i in 1:ncol(test_subset)){
  m = sum(is.na(test_subset[,i]))
  print(paste("column ", colnames(test_subset[i]), " has ", m , "missing values"))
  if(m>0){
    mvc = mvc+1
  }else{
    mvc
  }
}
#test_subset4 <- test_subset3    
test_subset4 <- na.aggregate(test_subset)
#names(test_subset4)

mvc <- 0 
for(i in 1:ncol(test_subset4)){
  m = sum(is.na(test_subset4[,i]))
  print(paste("column ", colnames(test_subset4[i]), " has ", m , "missing values"))
  if(m>0){
    mvc = mvc+1
  }else{
    mvc
  }
}
```

```{r, include = FALSE}
# train 
mvc <- 0 
for(i in 1:ncol(train_subset)){
  m = sum(is.na(train_subset[,i]))
  print(paste("column ", colnames(train_subset[i]), " has ", m , "missing values"))
  if(m>0){
    mvc = mvc+1
  }else{
    mvc
  }
}

train_subset4 <- na.aggregate(train_subset)

mvc <- 0 
for(i in 1:ncol(train_subset4)){
  m = sum(is.na(train_subset4[,i]))
  print(paste("column ", colnames(train_subset4[i]), " has ", m , "missing values"))
  if(m>0){
    mvc = mvc+1
  }else{
    mvc
  }
}

```

```{r, include = FALSE, cache=TRUE}
#install.packages("zoo")
#library(zoo)
#library(dplyr)
out.rf <- randomForest(Price~.,
                       data = train_subset4, importance=T)

importance(out.rf)
fitForest1 <- predict(out.rf, newdata = test_subset4)
#fitForest1[1:10]
#out.rf
```


```{r, include = FALSE, cache=TRUE}
importance <- importance(out.rf)
varImportance <- data.frame(Variables = row.names(importance),
                            Importance = round(importance[, '%IncMSE'],2))
rankImportance <- varImportance %>% mutate(Rank = paste0('#', dense_rank(desc(Importance))))

print("Plot of variable importance")
print("Variable importance of initial model")
ggplot(rankImportance, aes(x = reorder(Variables, Importance), 
                           y = Importance, fill = Importance)) +
  geom_bar(stat='identity') + 
  geom_text(aes(x = Variables, y = 0.5, label = Rank),
            hjust=0, vjust=0.55, size = 4, colour = 'red') +
  labs(x = 'Variables') +
  coord_flip() 
```

```{r, include = FALSE , cache=TRUE}
first_SSE <- mean((fitForest1-test_subset4$Price)^2)
first_SSE
mean(train_subset4$Price)
print("Inital prediction")
#testy <- test_subset4[test_subset4$Price != max(test_subset4$Price)]
plot(fitForest1,test_subset4$Price,
     xlab="predicted",ylab="actual", xaxt="n")
abline(a=0,b=1)
```

```{r, include = FALSE, cache=TRUE}
ctrl_none <- trainControl(method = "none")
grad_rf <- train(form = Price ~ .,   
                 data = train_subset4,
                 method = "rf",
                 trControl = ctrl_none,
                 tuneGrid = expand.grid(mtry = 2), 
                 na.action=na.roughfix)

price_rf_fit <- predict(grad_rf, newdata = test_subset4)
```

```{r, include = FALSE, cache = TRUE}
bag_fit <- randomForest(Price ~ ., data = train_subset4, mtry = ncol(train_subset4) - 1, importance = TRUE)
predict_bag_fit_price <- predict(bag_fit, newdata = test_subset4)
#predict_bag_fit_price[1:10]
```

```{r, include = FALSE, cache = TRUE}
# http://rstudio-pubs-static.s3.amazonaws.com/156481_80ee6ee3a0414fd38f5d3ad33d14c771.html
boostPrice <- gbm(Price~.,train_subset4,distribution="gaussian",n.trees=5000,interaction.depth=4)
summary(boostPrice)
predict_boost_fit_price <- predict(boostPrice, newdata = test_subset4)
```

```{r, include = FALSE, cache = TRUE}
combined_list <- list("Random Forest predictions: " = fitForest1[1:4], "Random Forest 2 predictions: " = price_rf_fit[1:4], "test_subset: " = test_subset4$Price[1:4], "Bag predictions: " = predict_bag_fit_price[1:4], "Boost predictions: " = predict_boost_fit_price[1:4])
#combined_list
#combined_list 
```




```{r, include = FALSE}
library(tree)
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
#library(party)
#library(partykit)
# ![Caption for the picture.](~/csu/dsci445/project-10/marksSlides/avgPriceRFTrain.pdf)

```




# Slide 1 


::: columns

:::: column

```{r,echo=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=6, out.width='100%', fig.align='left'}
#summary(tree_fit)#USE
summary(tree_fit)#USE
#tree_fit
tree_fit

```

::::

:::


# Slide 2


::: columns

:::: column


```{r,echo=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=12, out.width='100%'}
plot(tree_fit)
text(tree_fit, pretty = 0)
```

::::

:::


# Slide 3

::: columns

:::: column


```{r,echo=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=12, out.width='100%'}

print("Plot of variable importance")
print("Variable importance of model")
ggplot(rankImportance, aes(x = reorder(Variables, Importance), 
                           y = Importance, fill = Importance)) +
  geom_bar(stat='identity') + 
  geom_text(aes(x = Variables, y = 0.5, label = Rank),
            hjust=0, vjust=0.55, size = 4, colour = 'red') +
  labs(x = 'Variables') +
  coord_flip() 
```


::::


:::


# Slide 4


::: columns

:::: column

```{r,echo=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=10, out.width='80%'}
#summary(tree_fit)#USE
summary(boostPrice)
#predict_boost_fit_price <- predict(boostPrice, newdata = test_subset4)
```

::::

:::


# Slide 5


::: columns

:::: column

```{r,echo=FALSE}
#summary(tree_fit)#USE
#summary(boostPrice)
#predict_boost_fit_price <- predict(boostPrice, newdata = test_subset4)
combined_list
```

::::

:::
